plugins.name: wicked-garden
plugins.description: Your coding agent already plans and swarms — Wicked Garden is the curated toolkit for what it can't: proof-not-claims gates, code links grep can't see, deterministic refactor, cross-session memory, real multi-model second opinions. Don't fight the harness; fill its gaps. The gate needs wicked-vault + wicked-loom; testing/brain/bus are opt-in layers.
